positive: Intricate, stylized illustration of a cluster of bioluminescent fantasy mushrooms and minimalist celestial bodies (crescents and scattered stars). Use a high-contrast color palette of deep jewel tones—electric indigo, sapphire blue, neon teal, and violet—with crisp white outlines defining the elements. Vector art aesthetic, highly detailed etching style, graphic silhouette, designed for perfect screen printing on dark apparel. Symmetrical, whimsical, maximalist botanical design, dramatic spotlighting.
